briefdescription.para: This function resets the IIC instance for TI_LMK03318.

parameterdescription.para: IIC instance pointer.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u16 SlaveAddr, u8 *MsgPtr, unsigned ByteCount, u8 Option)
memberdef.name: TI_LMK03318_I2cSend

briefdescription.para: This function send the IIC data to TI_LMK03318.

parameterdescription.para: IIC instance pointer.
contains the 7 bit IIC address of the device to send the specified data to.
points to the data to be sent.
is the number of bytes to be sent.
indicates whether to hold or free the bus after transmitting the data.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u16 SlaveAddr, u8 *BufPtr, unsigned ByteCount, u8 Option)
memberdef.name: TI_LMK03318_I2cRecv

briefdescription.para: This function send the IIC data to TI_LMK03318.

parameterdescription.para: IIC instance pointer.
contains the 7 bit IIC address of the device to send the specified data to.
points to the memory to write the data.
is the number of bytes to be sent.
indicates whether to hold or free the bus after transmitting the data.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u8 RegisterAddress, u8 Value)
memberdef.name: TI_LMK03318_SetRegister

briefdescription.para: This function send a single byte to the TI LMK03318.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

briefdescription.para: This function send a single byte to the TI LMK03318.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u16 RegisterAddress, u8 Value, u8 Mask)
memberdef.name: TI_LMK03318_ModifyRegister

briefdescription.para: This function modifies a single byte to the TI LMK03318.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, int FIn, int FOut, u8 FreeRun)
memberdef.name: TI_LMK03318_SetClock

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u8 InPortID, u8 OutPortID)
memberdef.name: TI_LMK03318_EnableBypass

briefdescription.para: This function configures the TI LMK03318 to route the specified input port to the specified output port bypassing the PLL.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.
specifies the input port. Valid values are 0 to 1.
specifies the output port. Valid values are 4 to 7.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE I2C write error or incorrect parameters detected.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the TI LMK03318 with default values for use with the Video FMC.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

briefdescription.para: This function puts the TI LMK03318 into sleep.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

briefdescription.para: This function displays a registerdump of the TI LMK03318 device.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.
